title: chrysanthemum nodosum
intro: Chrysanthemum nodosum, also known as tuhonna or tuhao, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum nodosum include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and alleviating symptoms of the common cold and flu. Chrysanthemum nodosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine.
